headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “It's always weird to meet the new boss, and to find out they are much younger than me"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
